name: Blue Cheese Stuffed Mushrooms
recipeInstructions:
1. Clean mushrooms with damp paper towel and remove the stems.
2. Finely chop the mushroom stems and set aside.
3. Sauté mushroom caps in butter in a skillet until almost tender; drain on paper towels.
4. Sauté the chopped mushroom stems and red pepper in the same skillet.
5. Add cream, bring to a boil.
6. Reduce heat and add blue cheese; cook until melted.
7. Stir in cooked rice, basil, and white pepper; cook until thoroughly heated.
8. Spoon the rice mixture into the prepared mushroom caps.
9. Place mushroom caps in a greased shallow baking pan.
10. Bake at 350°F for 10 minutes or until tender.
11. Drain on paper towels.
12. Garnish with fresh basil before serving.
